title: Pan-Seared Trout à la Française
description: A classic French dish featuring fresh trout, pan-seared to perfection. Serve with a fresh salad for a light and delicious meal.
instructions: Season the trout fillets with salt and black pepper.
In a skillet, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium-high heat.
Add the trout fillets, skin side up, and sear for 2-3 minutes.
Flip the trout and sear for another 2-3 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the trout is cooking, prepare the salad by combining the mixed greens, cherry tomatoes, and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Serve the pan-seared trout with the fresh salad on the side.
